description: Case style: Analogue watch, has a stainless steel, circular case with red accents, and a fixed bezel with markingsDial style: Silver toned dial, has steel toned hands and markings with white and red accents, branding on the dialFeatures: Screw to reset the timeStrap style: Black, rubber strap secured with a tang claspWater resistant up to 50 mComes in a signature Q&Q caseWarranty: 1 year against manufacturing defects
